nasb.text: fracture for fracture, eye for eye, tooth for tooth; just as he has injured a man, so it shall be inflicted on him.

esv.text: fracture for fracture, eye for eye, tooth for tooth; whatever injury he has given a person shall be given to him.

cnv.text: 以傷還傷，以眼還眼，以牙還牙；他怎樣使人傷殘，人也必怎樣使他傷殘。

ccb.text: 要以眼还眼，以牙还牙。他怎样伤害别人，也要怎样伤害他。
